name: Bannari Amman Sugars Limited
summary: Bannari Amman Sugars Limited primarily produces and sells sugar in India. It operates through Sugar, Power, Distillery, and Granite Products segments. The company manufactures and sells cane crush; industrial alcohol and extra neutral spirits; and granite blocks, and polished granite slabs and tiles. It also generates power through co-generation power plants and wind mills. The company was incorporated in 1983 and is based in Coimbatore, India.
